tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceAddAttributesToFindings.addAttributesToFindings
tools.description: Assigns attributes (key and value pairs) to the findings that are specified by the ARNs of the findings.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceCreateAssessmentTarget.createAssessmentTarget
tools.description: Creates a new assessment target using the ARN of the resource group that is generated by CreateResourceGroup. If resourceGroupArn is not specified, all EC2 instances in the current AWS account and region are included in the assessment target. If the service-linked role isn’t already registered, this action also creates and registers a service-linked role to grant Amazon Inspector access to AWS Services needed to perform security assessments. You can create up to 50 assessment targets per AWS account. You can run up to 500 concurrent agents per AWS account. For more information, see Amazon Inspector Assessment Targets.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceCreateAssessmentTemplate.createAssessmentTemplate
tools.description: Creates an assessment template for the assessment target that is specified by the ARN of the assessment target. If the service-linked role isn’t already registered, this action also creates and registers a service-linked role to grant Amazon Inspector access to AWS Services needed to perform security assessments.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceCreateExclusionsPreview.createExclusionsPreview
tools.description: Starts the generation of an exclusions preview for the specified assessment template. The exclusions preview lists the potential exclusions (ExclusionPreview) that Inspector can detect before it runs the assessment.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceCreateResourceGroup.createResourceGroup
tools.description: Creates a resource group using the specified set of tags (key and value pairs) that are used to select the EC2 instances to be included in an Amazon Inspector assessment target. The created resource group is then used to create an Amazon Inspector assessment target. For more information, see CreateAssessmentTarget.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceDeleteAssessmentRun.deleteAssessmentRun
tools.description: Deletes the assessment run that is specified by the ARN of the assessment run.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceDeleteAssessmentTarget.deleteAssessmentTarget
tools.description: Deletes the assessment target that is specified by the ARN of the assessment target.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceDeleteAssessmentTemplate.deleteAssessmentTemplate
tools.description: Deletes the assessment template that is specified by the ARN of the assessment template.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceDescribeAssessmentRuns.describeAssessmentRuns
tools.description: Describes the assessment runs that are specified by the ARNs of the assessment runs.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceDescribeAssessmentTargets.describeAssessmentTargets
tools.description: Describes the assessment targets that are specified by the ARNs of the assessment targets.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceDescribeAssessmentTemplates.describeAssessmentTemplates
tools.description: Describes the assessment templates that are specified by the ARNs of the assessment templates.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceDescribeCrossAccountAccessRole.describeCrossAccountAccessRole
tools.description: Describes the IAM role that enables Amazon Inspector to access your AWS account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceDescribeExclusions.describeExclusions
tools.description: Describes the exclusions that are specified by the exclusions' ARNs.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceDescribeFindings.describeFindings
tools.description: Describes the findings that are specified by the ARNs of the findings.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceDescribeResourceGroups.describeResourceGroups
tools.description: Describes the resource groups that are specified by the ARNs of the resource groups.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceDescribeRulesPackages.describeRulesPackages
tools.description: Describes the rules packages that are specified by the ARNs of the rules packages.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceGetAssessmentReport.getAssessmentReport
tools.description: Produces an assessment report that includes detailed and comprehensive results of a specified assessment run.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceGetExclusionsPreview.getExclusionsPreview
tools.description: Retrieves the exclusions preview (a list of ExclusionPreview objects) specified by the preview token. You can obtain the preview token by running the CreateExclusionsPreview API.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceGetTelemetryMetadata.getTelemetryMetadata
tools.description: Information about the data that is collected for the specified assessment run.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceListAssessmentRunAgents.listAssessmentRunAgents
tools.description: Lists the agents of the assessment runs that are specified by the ARNs of the assessment runs.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceListAssessmentRuns.listAssessmentRuns
tools.description: Lists the assessment runs that correspond to the assessment templates that are specified by the ARNs of the assessment templates.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceListAssessmentTargets.listAssessmentTargets
tools.description: Lists the ARNs of the assessment targets within this AWS account. For more information about assessment targets, see Amazon Inspector Assessment Targets.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceListAssessmentTemplates.listAssessmentTemplates
tools.description: Lists the assessment templates that correspond to the assessment targets that are specified by the ARNs of the assessment targets.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceListEventSubscriptions.listEventSubscriptions
tools.description: Lists all the event subscriptions for the assessment template that is specified by the ARN of the assessment template. For more information, see SubscribeToEvent and UnsubscribeFromEvent.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceListExclusions.listExclusions
tools.description: List exclusions that are generated by the assessment run.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceListFindings.listFindings
tools.description: Lists findings that are generated by the assessment runs that are specified by the ARNs of the assessment runs.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceListRulesPackages.listRulesPackages
tools.description: Lists all available Amazon Inspector rules packages.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceListTagsForResource.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Lists all tags associated with an assessment template.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServicePreviewAgents.previewAgents
tools.description: Previews the agents installed on the EC2 instances that are part of the specified assessment target.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceRegisterCrossAccountAccessRole.registerCrossAccountAccessRole
tools.description: Registers the IAM role that grants Amazon Inspector access to AWS Services needed to perform security assessments.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceRemoveAttributesFromFindings.removeAttributesFromFindings
tools.description: Removes entire attributes (key and value pairs) from the findings that are specified by the ARNs of the findings where an attribute with the specified key exists.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceSetTagsForResource.setTagsForResource
tools.description: Sets tags (key and value pairs) to the assessment template that is specified by the ARN of the assessment template.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceStartAssessmentRun.startAssessmentRun
tools.description: Starts the assessment run specified by the ARN of the assessment template. For this API to function properly, you must not exceed the limit of running up to 500 concurrent agents per AWS account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceStopAssessmentRun.stopAssessmentRun
tools.description: Stops the assessment run that is specified by the ARN of the assessment run.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceSubscribeToEvent.subscribeToEvent
tools.description: Enables the process of sending Amazon Simple Notification Service (SNS) notifications about a specified event to a specified SNS topic.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceUnsubscribeFromEvent.unsubscribeFromEvent
tools.description: Disables the process of sending Amazon Simple Notification Service (SNS) notifications about a specified event to a specified SNS topic.

tools.name: xAmzTargetInspectorServiceUpdateAssessmentTarget.updateAssessmentTarget
tools.description:
Updates the assessment target that is specified by the ARN of the assessment target.

If resourceGroupArn is not specified, all EC2 instances in the current AWS account and region are included in the assessment target.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
